script.narration: Great opening — you started with a friendly 'Thanks for hopping on, John,' which set a nice tone.
You quickly dug into the discovery by asking, 'How's ticket volume lately?' That got you talking about real pain points.
But then Tableau came up, and you sensed some hesitation when he said, 'You don't have Tableau integration,' which really threw you off.
Instead of home-running with that thirty-eight-K SQL connector option, you mentioned it's on your roadmap, which dropped the EV to just four K.
That left you with him saying, 'Just send me the deck,' signaling he was checked out. Tough spot.
